name: Tex Mex Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes until fork tender.
2. Drain and cool them, then cut into bite-sized chunks.
3. Mix with remaining salad ingredients.
4. Whisk dressing ingredients together.
5. Pour dressing over salad and toss gently to coat.
6. Chill for at least 1 to 1-1/2 hours to allow flavors to blend.
7. Garnish with fresh basil before serving.
Makes 6-8 servings. For a more authentic taste and appearance, roast the peppers until the skin is charred, peel off the blackened skin, and then cut into chunks.
